title: 2 for Tuesday
excerpt: 1. By the time you read this, we will officially be on our babymoon. Our itinerary is a bit crazy, but basically we are going to be in Thailand mostly and then Cambodia, with a couple stops in Kuala Lumpur.…
body:
1. By the time you read this, we will officially be on our babymoon. Our itinerary is a bit crazy, but basically we are going to be in Thailand mostly and then Cambodia, with a couple stops in Kuala Lumpur. Don't worry, there will be plenty of time to relax! This trip was booked months ago using all of our British Airways miles and also some money. It's JC's first time to Asia, which will make this the 6th continent he's visited.

As usual, we have packed light and with only carry-ons. Because the weather will be hot, it's easier to accomplish this, even for a nearly 2 week trip. We each have a Tumi roller suitcase that fits into the overhead bin, and I have my signature purse - for those who missed out, amykathryn and I have another in store for you this September - and he has his Jack Spade duffel. And like a true gentleman, he lifts my suitcase and always asks if I am ok with carrying/pulling anything. And plus, it's really amazing to me how nice strangers are (especially in airports and airplanes) to pregnant women. I find myself saying, "Thank you" and "Oh, that's ok." a lot these days. Love it. Don't fret - while we are gone, I will be posting a bit on Instagram (@amytangerine) - and also have some really fun blog posts lined up, including some awesome guest posts and giveaways.

2. Thrilled to announce my newest online class, Toolbox, that I am co-teaching with some super talented ladies at Studio Calico.
